name: Metatron — Offensive Security / Penetration Testing
description: Imports a Metatron penetration-test / engagement export into XORCISM: discovered hosts become ASSETs, open services become services, and enumerated vulnerabilities / exploited findings become vulnerabilities on their host (confirmed exploits flagged exploitable). The host -> service -> exploit -> impact steps feed pentest attack chains (XCHAIN) for the /pentest/chain viewer. INTRUSIVE / authorized-targets only — run under a signed Rules of Engagement. Config: METATRON_API_URL + METATRON_API_TOKEN for live pull, or pass `file` = a Metatron export JSON (or run with no config for the bundled sample).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved Metatron engagement export JSON
